context: Tests whether the agent corrects AVKit playback setup for PiP, AirPlay, and background audio without overclaiming.

checklist.name: Background mode
checklist.description: Declares Background Modes > Audio, AirPlay, and Picture in Picture, represented by UIBackgroundModes audio.

checklist.name: Playback category
checklist.description: Uses AVAudioSession category .playback with mode .moviePlayback for movie playback.

checklist.name: Activation timing
checklist.description: Defers setActive(true) until playback begins instead of activating at app launch.

checklist.name: Standard player behavior
checklist.description: Explains that AVPlayerViewController provides standard PiP/AirPlay UI when app, device, media, and route support are configured.

checklist.name: No unsupported requirement
checklist.description: Does not invent a PiP entitlement or claim silent failure as the diagnostic model.
